title: elaeocarpus samari
intro: Elaeocarpus samari, also known as the Blue Olive or Blue Wedge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus samari include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Elaeocarpus samari include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat digestive issues and boost the immune system.
